exercises.title: HNDL Risk Assessment Tool
exercises.description: Build a tool to assess HNDL risk for different data types.
tasks: Define data classification categories with protection lifetimes
Calculate HNDL risk scores based on quantum timeline estimates
Create visualization of risk vs. timeline
exercises.expectedOutput: HNDL risk assessment tool with prioritized recommendations
hints: Consider regulatory requirements for data retention
Include uncertainty ranges in quantum estimates

exercises.title: Threat Model Builder
exercises.description: Create an interactive threat model builder for PQC systems.
tasks: Generate threat model reports in markdown
exercises.expectedOutput: Threat model builder with report generation
hints: Allow custom threats to be added
Export to multiple formats (MD, JSON, HTML)

exercises.title: Adversary Capability Analyzer
exercises.description: Model different adversary profiles and their capabilities.
tasks: Model resource requirements for different attacks
Recommend defenses based on adversary model
exercises.expectedOutput: Adversary modeling and defense recommendation system
hints: Nation-states vs. criminal groups vs. opportunistic
Match defenses to actual threat actors

exercises.title: Algorithm Security Comparison
exercises.description: Compare security properties of NIST PQC algorithms.
tasks: List hard problems for each NIST algorithm
Identify main attack vectors for each
hints: Consider both mathematical and implementation security
Hybrid schemes provide defense in depth
